+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your backstage version and configuration:\n```bash\nnpx backstage-cli info\n```\nThis feature requires a working backstage installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review backstage configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant backstage configuration:\nRight now only older versions of Google Analytics are supported by the [`/plugin-analytics-module-ga`](https://github.com/backstage/backstage/tree/master/plugins/analytics-module-ga)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Google Analytics 4 as a analytics integration",
+        "description": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\n\nThis plugin provides an opinionated implementation of the Backstage Analytics\nAPI for Google Analytics 4. Once installed and configured, analytics events will\nbe sent to GA as your users navigate and use your Backstage instance.\n\nThis plugin contains no other functionality.\r\n\n#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist\n\n- [X ] A changeset describing the change and affected packages. ([more\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."

+      }
